main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'BaSO4 T-04 + 22-day zero antiscalant + interrupted dosing' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (orgánico, coloidal, OXID degradation, MECH damage).

recommended_action.justification: CIP HCl 50-100 mg/L (0.005-0.01% w/w) — concentración insuficiente; BaSO4 es prácticamente insoluble en ácido (gold expects DTPA/EDTA en alcalino).

requested_data.justification: Pide SEM membrane coupon T-04 stage 1 tail — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single threshold: <5% BaSO4 surface coverage → switch a partial reversible.

reviewer_notes: C4=1 por chemistry incorrecta (BaSO4 no responde a ácido; gold prescribe DTPA/EDTA alcalino).
